final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input clear,
    input load,
    input [7:0] d,
    output reg [7:0] q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (clear) begin
        q <= 8'b00000000;
    end else if (load) begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
